name: Ma Ai
page_title: Ma Ai 馬艾 [Wei] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Ma Ai held office as the Administrator of Dunhuang. After his death, Zhang Jin and Huang Hua rebelled against Wei. Su Ze quelled the rebellion, killing Zhang Jin and forcing Huang Hua to capitulate.

Sources: A Biographical Dictionary of the Later-Han to Three Kingdoms by Dr. Rafe de Crespigny, Chronicles of the Three Kingdoms by Achilles Fang

sections.short-biography: Held office as Administrator of Dunhuang.

full_text:
Ma Ai 馬艾
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Ai (馬艾). Held office as Administrator of Dunhuang. Ma Ai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Ma Ai lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Ma Ai held office as the Administrator of Dunhuang. After his death, Zhang Jin and Huang Hua rebelled against Wei. Su Ze quelled the rebellion, killing Zhang Jin and forcing Huang Hua to capitulate.
Sources:A Biographical Dictionary of the Later-Han to Three Kingdomsby Dr. Rafe de Crespigny,Chronicles of the Three Kingdomsby Achilles Fang
